title: Boat Step Up
description: Allows boats to step up one-block height changes, making them perfect for boat drifting in Minecraft
body:
**⚠️ Use at your own risk! This mod may cause crashes or break something in your world.**  

**Boat Step Up**  

Navigate Minecraft’s waters with ease! Boat Step Up allows your boat to climb one-block height changes effortlessly, ensuring smooth travel over uneven terrain. Whether you're cruising through rivers or exploring vast oceans, this mod enhances your boating experience.  

Plus, with its step-up feature, you can now enjoy boat drifting, adding a fun and dynamic element to your water adventures!  

**Features:**  
- Boats can step up one-block heights  
- Perfect for boat drifting  
- Lightweight and easy to install  

Make your boat journeys more seamless and exciting with Boat Step Up!
